purpose: Ambient activity overlay bound to event stream signals with fallback modes.
truth_rules: Continuous pulse without events is fake-green risk and must be avoided.
proof_requirements: Event-disconnected state falls back to static/unknown.
fake_green_risks: Activity pulse can imply healthy execution while backend stalled.
accessibility_rules: State must not be encoded by color alone.
RU/EN labels must remain explicit for status tags.
change_safety: Topology hardening scope only; no final UI readiness claims.
